queries.sql:
SELECT SUM(CAST(c AS BIGINT)) AS sum_row_number,
       COUNT(o_orderkey) AS count_o_orderkey,
       COUNT(o_orderstatus) AS count_o_orderstatus,
       COUNT(o_orderpriority) AS count_o_orderpriority,
       COUNT(o_clerk) AS count_o_clerk,
       COUNT(o_shippriority) AS count_o_shippriority
FROM (
  SELECT o_orderkey,
         o_orderstatus,
         o_orderpriority,
         o_clerk,
         o_shippriority,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o_custkey ORDER BY join_key) AS c
  FROM scale.orders_scale_06
) sorted_orders

theorem.description: Sort scale test with window ordering over orders scaled to 6x
theorem.name: EE-SORT-SCALE-06
